prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
T-001 is a critical substation transformer with no spare unit available. Assess its remaining useful life, identify which sensors are available and check them for anomalies over the past 30 days, and determine whether the current condition supports continued operation through the next planned 90-day maintenance window.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should retrieve available sensors, report an RUL estimate, identify any anomalies in the past 30 days, and give a clear go/no-go recommendation for the 90-day operating window, noting the no-spare constraint.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [tsfm] get_rul — Get the remaining useful life of T-001
  Step 2: [iot] list_sensors — List available sensors for T-001 (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [tsfm] detect_anomalies — Detect anomalies in the available sensors over the past 30 days (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [iot] get_asset_metadata — Get the current condition of T-001

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Get the remaining useful life of T-001",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "get_rul",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-001",
      "sensors": true,
      "anomaly_window": 30,
      "maintenance_window": 90
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-001\",\n  \"as_of_date\": \"2024-01-31\",\n  \"rul_days\": 2526,\n  \"health_index\": 1.0,\n  \"fdd_category\": 1,\n  \"confidence\": 0.808,\n  \"interpretation\": \"Healthy \\u2014 no immediate action required.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "List available sensors for T-001",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-001",
      "as_of_date": "2024-01-31",
      "rul_days": 2526,
      "health_index": 1.0,
      "fdd_category": 1,
      "confidence": 0.808,
      "interpretation": "Healthy \u2014 no immediate action required.",
      "anomaly_days": 30,
      "maintenance_window": 90
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Detect anomalies in the available sensors over the past 30 days",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "detect_anomalies",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-001",
      "sensor_id": "load_current_a",
      "window_size": 30,
      "z_threshold": null
    },
    "response": "Error executing tool detect_anomalies: 1 validation error for detect_anomaliesArguments\nz_threshold\n  Input should be a valid number [type=float_type, input_value=None, input_type=NoneType]\n    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/float_type",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Get the current condition of T-001",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "get_asset_metadata",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-001",
      "as_of_date": "2024-01-31",
      "rul_days": 2526,
      "health_index": 1.0,
      "fdd_category": 1,
      "confidence": 0.808,
      "interpretation": "Healthy \u2014 no immediate action required.",
      "sensor_id": "load_current_a",
      "unit": "A",
      "num_readings": 720,
      "z_threshold": 2.0,
      "anomaly_window": 30,
      "maintenance_window": 90
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-001\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-001\",\n  \"manufacturer\": \"ABB\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Alpha\",\n  \"voltage_class\": \"132kV/33kV\",\n  \"rating_kva\": 1500,\n  \"install_date\": \"2006-10-18\",\n  \"age_years\": 18,\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"fdd_category\": 1,\n  \"rul_days\": 2526,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the results, the remaining useful life of T-001 is approximately 2,526 days, with a health index of 1.0 and a confidence level of 80.8%, indicating that the transformer is in a healthy condition with no immediate action required.

Available sensors for T-001 include load current, oil temperature, power factor, high-voltage voltage, low-voltage voltage, and winding temperature.

However, due to a validation error in the anomaly detection tool, it was not possible to detect anomalies in the available sensors over the past 30 days.

The current condition of T-001 supports continued operation through the next planned 90-day maintenance window, as indicated by its healthy status, age of 18 years, and remaining useful life of 2,526 days.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Improve anomaly detection tool validation and re-order steps to optimize dependency resolution"
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve anomaly detection tool validation and re-order steps to optimize dependency resolution
